title: Vibrant Biomes
description: A vanilla-friendly data pack that allows biomes to be more colorful.
body:
### **🔔 This Data Pack has a required Resource Pack. [Click here](https://modrinth.com/datapack/vibrant-biomes/versions) to download the Resource Pack**

# About The Pack:

⚡This is Vibrant Biomes. This data pack gives biomes a more vibrant sky color for each biome and biome variant, as well as being vanilla-friendly.

🚨New content coming soon!

# More Information:

### ✅ This data pack changes the following biomes:
- Birch Forest & Old Growth
- Savanna & Its Variants
- Desert
- All Snowy Biomes
- Taiga & Its Variants
- Sunflower Plains
- Flower Forest
- Cherry Grove
- Badlands & Its Variants
- Jungle & Its Variants
- Mushroom Fields
- Dark Forest
- Swamp
- Mangrove Swamps
- Stony Peaks
- Forest
- Windswept Gravelly Hills
- Deep Dark (Only At Surface Level)
- Nether Biomes (Overworld Only)
- End Biomes (Water Only)

### ❌ This data pack does not change the following biomes:
- Plains
- Pale Garden
- Caves
- Rivers & Oceans
- Nether Biomes (Original Dimension)
- End Biomes (Original Dimension)

🔥 Don't like certain colors? You're free to modify this data pack however you can.

# Important:

**🔔 Make sure to download the required resource pack for the autumn birch trees. Nothing is final! Everything is subject to change!**
